name: pm-groundwork
description: A Claude Code starter kit for program, project, and product managers. Works in terminal and Cursor. Interactive setup interview, persistent memory, structured decision logging, and full GSD framework integration — all in one installable plugin.

commands.name: pm-setup
commands.description: Bootstrap a new PM project workspace with an interactive interview. Creates all management files, initializes decision logging, sets up GSD framework, and tailors everything to your project and working style.

commands.name: pm-end-session
commands.description: End-of-session wrap-up. Updates memory, logs decisions, syncs GSD state, and backs up to git if configured.
